Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" LIMIT 10 OFFSET 5) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
